project: Ink CLI Session UI V2 Web Parity
description: Extend renderer-neutral session-ui models for rich cards, status, command catalog, command results, and pickers consumed by Web and Ink.

userStories.title: Add shared terminal card descriptors
userStories.description: As a renderer implementer, I need shared card descriptors so Web and Ink use the same meaning for status, thinking, model, login, tool, yielded-run, and error cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Add renderer-neutral terminal card descriptor types under src/session-ui
Map representative trace/action outputs to card descriptors
Shared modules avoid DOM, browser, CSS, Ink, and renderer-specific imports
Tests cover status, thinking, model, login, tool, yielded-run, compaction, and error descriptors
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in a423768fbd55d80f3a8c18ffed8828efa17030a4. Added renderer-neutral terminal card descriptor types and builders in src/session-ui/terminalCards.ts for status, thinking, model, login, tool, yielded-run, compaction, command, and error rows. The descriptors map CompactTerminalRow inputs to stable card kind/title/status/tone/rows/actions without importing React, Ink, DOM, CSS, or browser APIs. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/session-ui-terminal-rows.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs' passed 9/9 focused tests; test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs covers status, thinking, model, login, tool, yielded-run, compaction, and error descriptors. Path classification: shared model/unit path only; no user-facing TUI rendering changed, so PTY artifacts were not required. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 504 tests; 503 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Add shared status and progress view model
userStories.description: As a user, I want context and quota status to carry the same semantics in Web and CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Create shared status descriptor with owner, session, model, runtime state, cwd, context usage, provider usage, thinking, fast mode, warnings, and errors
Represent progress/quota bars as renderer-neutral values and labels
Missing usage data is represented as unavailable, not zero
Secret-like values are redacted before rendering
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in a423768fbd55d80f3a8c18ffed8828efa17030a4. Added src/session-ui/statusViewModel.ts with shared status fields and renderer-neutral progress/quota descriptors for owner, session, model, runtime state, cwd, context usage, provider usage, thinking, fast mode, warnings, and errors. Missing usage data is represented as state=unavailable, while zero usage remains state=available with percent=0. Secret-like values are redacted through redactTerminalSecret before rendering. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/session-ui-terminal-rows.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs' passed 9/9 focused tests; tests assert unavailable-vs-zero semantics, progress bar text, provider quota descriptors, and redaction. Path classification: shared model/unit path only; no user-facing TUI rendering changed, so PTY artifacts were not required. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 504 tests; 503 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Add shared command catalog and result descriptors
userStories.description: As a CLI and Web user, I want slash command names, descriptions, arguments, and results to stay aligned across renderers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add shared command descriptor types for slash text, action name, description, argument hints, support status, and terminal adaptation metadata
Add shared command result descriptors for menu, status, session-link, text, JSON, unsupported, and error results
Tests cover command filtering and result normalization
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in a423768fbd55d80f3a8c18ffed8828efa17030a4. Added src/session-ui/commandCatalog.ts with shared slash command descriptors for slash text, action name, description, argument hints, support status, terminal adaptation metadata, CLI-only commands, Web parity commands, and explicit unsupported reasons for browser-only/deferred commands. Added src/session-ui/commandResults.ts with shared command result descriptors for menu, status, session-link, text, JSON, unsupported, and error results. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/session-ui-terminal-rows.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs' passed 9/9 focused tests; tests cover catalog generation/merging/filtering and command result normalization for menus, status, session links, unsupported results, and redacted errors. Path classification: shared model/unit path only; no user-facing TUI rendering changed, so PTY artifacts were not required. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 504 tests; 503 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Add shared owner room session picker descriptors
userStories.description: As a renderer implementer, I need shared picker descriptors so owner, room, and session selection stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Add owner, room, and session picker descriptor types under src/session-ui
Descriptors include labels, descriptions, ids, active/current markers, disabled/archived state, and create-new actions
Tests cover Personal Chat default room and empty-room state
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in a423768fbd55d80f3a8c18ffed8828efa17030a4. Added src/session-ui/ownerViewModel.ts and src/session-ui/roomSessionViewModel.ts with shared owner, room, and session picker descriptors. Descriptors include ids, labels, descriptions, owner/room/session ids, active/current/default/fallback/archived/disabled state, markers, back items, and create-new-session actions. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/session-ui-terminal-rows.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs' passed 9/9 focused tests; tests cover current owner selection, Root recovery markers, Personal Chat default room, active room preference, empty-room create-new action, back item, and current session marker. Path classification: shared model/unit path only; no user-facing TUI rendering changed, so PTY artifacts were not required. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' ran 504 tests; 503 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed.

userStories.title: Wire Web Compact Terminal to shared descriptors without behavior regression
userStories.description: As a Web user, I want existing Compact Terminal behavior preserved while shared models become the source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Web Compact Terminal consumes shared descriptors for at least one rich card path without visual/behavior regression
Existing Web tests and chat-ui typecheck pass
No CLI renderer imports Web DOM components
Web regression checks pass
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 0370e039a1de7782b863858927af73fe4eceafd6. Web Compact Terminal status rendering now consumes the shared renderer-neutral terminal card/status descriptors via buildTerminalCardDescriptor(row) and statusView in src/apps/chat-ui/src/session-views/compact-terminal/TerminalStatusCard.tsx. The Web component remains DOM-specific but maps shared descriptor title, status fields, and context progress into existing Web styling, with stable data-shared-terminal-card/data-shared-status-field/data-shared-progress hooks. No CLI renderer imports Web DOM/CSS/browser modules. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs test/session-ui-terminal-rows.test.mjs' passed 10/10 focused tests, including a static regression that verifies Web status-card descriptor consumption and CLI/Web boundary isolation. Web checks: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run chat-ui:typecheck && npm run chat-ui:build && npm run typecheck' passed; chat-ui build completed with only existing Vite chunk-size warnings. Full validation after the telemetry retention timestamp fix: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck && npm test' passed 521/521 tests. Path classification: Web DOM renderer path consuming shared renderer-neutral descriptors plus static source/unit tests; no Ink/PT UI behavior changed for this story, so no PTY artifact was required specifically for PRD 03 US-005.
